title: Catalyst Reactor Farm: Spending Freshness at the Price Peaks
strategies: constant max: every reactor runs at full throughput every step, never regenerating (reproduces the checker baseline)
threshold maintenance: run flat-out, regenerate the moment marginal conversion drops below a fixed rate; ignores prices and demand

freshness-inventory: idle through cheap low-demand valleys to conserve catalyst, park the offline regenerations inside those valleys, and run flat-out only during high-price demand peaks so each peak is met fresh
coordinated freshness with valley harvesting: reserve enough reactors fresh for each demand peak while opportunistically selling to demand caps in valleys with the aged catalyst
